title: Spicy Gooey Kenyan Suet Stir-fry
description: This keto-friendly spicy gooey dish features suet and dates, perfect for a date-night dinner.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup shredded cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: can be substituted with any keto-friendly cheese

instructions: Mix suet, dates, chili powder, cheese, and salt in a small bowl.
Press mixture into the bottom of a greased shallow baking dish.
Bake for about 20 minutes or until edges start to brown slightly.
Stir butter and remaining teaspoon chili powder over low heat until melted.
Drizzle the heated sauce over the hot baked suet mixture, stirring gently to combine.
Let sit for a few minutes before serving.
